failure_reason: Promoted summary source route/stream carriers to socket-served route traces and backpressure-aware stream windows. The multi-source proof now opens a real local socket listener, sends a TCP request, serves it through kh-serve-listener, receives the native-kernel HTTP wire response, extracts the body, records request/wire/body byte counts, and carries that as a source-data receipt. The stream lane reads three .fkb events after cursor 1, consumes a capacity-2 window, and records deferred-count/pressure/status/decision before learning. Focused multi-source remains 65535 as a 3-kernel only host-I/O proof; real-source remains 8191; base summary-learning remains 262143 with fourth-arm proof.
